content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 11, 2006

Glenn R. Harris, Superintendent
ETNA Union Elementary School District
P.O. Box 490
Etna, CA 96027

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-060

Dear Mr. Harris:

This letter confirms the receipt of your April 4, 2006, request for advice regarding the state board of education hearing. We must decline your request for advice since that would amount to advice on past conduct because the item in question was already distributed. (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C).) Moreover, with respect to your question about the appropriate use of public funds, this is not within our jurisdiction. (See the comment in regulation 18420, copy enclosed.) You should contact the Office of the Attorney General or your own agency counsel for advice pertaining to this question.

Therefore, your request is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd
